title: astragalus littoralis
intro: Astragalus littoralis, also known as the saltbush milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the coastal regions of Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help to boost the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus littoralis include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural response to illness. Astragalus littoralis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
